assertions.notes: Submitting https://www.douyin.com/user/MS4wLjABAAAAnormal stayed in scope, created session session_f8baea8a46c5d37a7d51fdc2, and routed to /sessions/session_f8baea8a46c5d37a7d51fdc2 candidate review. Network log captured POST /api/intake followed by GET /api/sessions/session_f8baea8a46c5d37a7d51fdc2. No browser errors were reported.

Submitting malformed input notaurl kept the browser on /, preserved the typed value, and showed the actionable message 'This link is not supported. Please provide a Douyin creator profile or single video link.' Network log showed POST /api/intake, and no browser errors were reported.

After creator-profile intake, the first destination was candidate review. DOM inspection found no prepare button and no pending/downloading/transcribing/ready/failed prep statuses, and captured network entries showed only intake/session reads with no prepare request. No browser errors were reported.

Could not complete invalid-to-valid retry validation because the dev server on http://127.0.0.1:3100 stopped responding before the retry sequence. A follow-up open and curl -I both returned connection refused, so recovery could not be re-tested without restarting shared infrastructure, which is out of scope.

The creator-profile session rendered a populated candidate review table with 8 discovered videos as the first post-intake screen. Network logs showed GET /api/sessions/session_f8baea8a46c5d37a7d51fdc2, while DOM inspection found no prepare button or prep status text prior to manual action. No browser errors were reported.

Table header and rows visibly included title, publish date, duration, likes, comments, shares, score, recommended flag, and row selection checkboxes. Observed row values were populated for all 8 fixture rows; no browser errors were reported.

Candidate review visibly showed deterministic numeric scores (93..76) and a recommended flag of '✓ Yes' for rows without any AI workflow. Network requests captured only local session APIs, and DOM inspection confirmed score/recommended data present in rendered route data. No browser errors were reported.

summary: Validated 7 assigned assertions for the intake-normal flow: 6 passed and 1 was blocked because the local dev server stopped responding before the retry/recovery assertion could be completed. Evidence was captured for the invalid intake state and creator-profile candidate review/table flow.
